name: Iran
summary: Day 75 of Hormuz blockade. **TRUMP 1-WEEK CLOCK DAY 6/7 (closes May 14) — TRUMP DEPARTED FOR BEIJING DECLARING HE 'DOES NOT NEED XI'S HELP ON IRAN' (CONFIRMED), US WILL WIN 'ONE WAY OR THE OTHER'; framework still on 'massive life support'; pre-Beijing posture materially harder than May 6–10 pulse-test phase. IRAN STATE-MEDIA HARDENING ACROSS ALL CHANNELS: IRNA + Tasnim + Parliament's National Security/Foreign Policy Commission now publicly synchronised on a 'we will not bow / we will retaliate if struck again / weapons-grade is on the table' line — opposite of April's IRNA-vs-Tasnim divergence pattern. PARLIAMENTARY SPOKESPERSON REZAEI (NSFP Commission) PUBLICLY NAMED 90% ENRICHMENT AS RETALIATORY THRESHOLD IF IRAN IS STRUCK AGAIN (CONFIRMED RHETORIC, NOT ACTION) — first time in cycle a sitting Iranian parliamentary spokesperson has publicly named weapons-grade enrichment as a tripwire; current stated ceiling is 60% with ~440 kg stockpile, 90% line is the breakout threshold. Mehr News + Tabnak + Euronews + Iran International + Tasnim + Al Bawaba all amplified without editorial softening — Iranian state-media system permitted weapons-grade rhetoric as sanctioned policy signal, not a leaked outlier. Critically PARALLEL TO ECONOMIC ADMISSIONS: Deputy Labour Minister Mohammadi publicly confirmed >1 million direct job losses + 2 million unemployment-impacted from the war (NYT citing Jerusalem Post); Day 74 of comprehensive internet blackout. Iran is publicly admitting domestic economic deterioration WHILE publicly hardening on the nuclear file — classical regime-survival externalisation playbook now visible. **IRAN FM ARAGHCHI ARRIVES NEW DELHI MAY 13 FOR BRICS FM MEETING (May 14–15); MEETS MODI MAY 14 — SAME DAY TRUMP IN BEIJING (CONFIRMED — Iran Embassy New Delhi + India TV + Tribune India)** — Iran will sit at BRICS table with Chinese FM while Trump is in Xi's anteroom; India's most overt strategic-autonomy choreography of cycle.** **A5 RIAL TRAJECTORY RECALIBRATED — yesterday's brief listed 1,853,000 as May 12 print but ACTUAL CLOSE PRINT is 1,842,000 IRR/USD (+0.66% d/d, +12,000 IRR); revised 48h sequence is 1,799K → 1,830K (May 10) → 1,842K (May 12) = +2.4% over 72h (vs prior brief's +3.0% over 48h); 2M trigger ETA shifts modestly to May 22-24 if linear (vs May 19-21 prior). Canary still pointing same direction — accelerating — but slightly less aggressively than prior implied.** **A6 MOJTABA KHAMENEI DAY 6 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE post May 7 Pezeshkian meeting; NYT (citing four Iranian officials) reports serious injuries (multiple surgeries legs/arms, facial+lip burns affecting speech), aide rebuts ('perfect health... only fracture behind ear, slightly injured knee/back'); The National (Abu Dhabi) tilts toward injury narrative May 10. Institutional command without visible person remains stable equilibrium since Feb 28; trigger (video/audio appearance) HAS NOT FIRED.** **B4 IRAN MISSILE FIRE RATE COLLAPSED 92% from Feb-Mar peak per Jerusalem Post + CNN intel assessment (capability ≠ willingness ≠ logistics); 1,471 ballistic missiles fired Feb 28 – Apr 20; May 4-5 UAE small-scale was last meaningful kinetic response — nothing since. Capacity ceiling holding. Operational architecture of 'between a cold war and a hot war' (Sadjadpour) intact.** **A9 KHARG SLICK CONSOLIDATED VIA COPERNICUS: Al Jazeera + ynet + Jerusalem Post + Conflict and Environment Observatory now amplify Sentinel-1/-2/-3 imagery showing ~45 sq km west of Kharg (May 6-8); Iranian VP Shina Ansari publicly denied Iranian-facility origin, pins on 'foreign tanker dumping ballast water'; Fox May 11-12 second ~12-20 sq km slick is consistent with drift south rather than separate event = re-appearance trigger AMBIGUOUSLY ACTIVATED (drift ≠ re-appearance, ballast counter-claim not falsified); Western wires in slow-amplification mode on attribution.** **B1 OFAC ECONOMIC FURY EXTENDED: Treasury signalled prepared secondary sanctions on five Chinese teapot refineries (Hengli Petrochemical Dalian, Shandong Jincheng, Hebei Xinhai, Shouguang Luqing, Shandong Shengxing); China MOFCOM May 2 issued Prohibition Order under Blocking Rules — FIRST FORMAL CHINESE INVOCATION OF BLOCKING RULES vs US sanctions** (CONFIRMED Treasury + MOFCOM primary). The post-rejection landscape (post-Trump rejection May 11, post-Litani crossing May 12, post-Saudi-strikes disclosure May 12) has produced ZERO Iranian kinetic retaliation — no ballistic launches since May 4-5, no second Red Sea or Qatari EEZ strike, no Saudi/UAE response. The negative space IS the intelligence: 75 days into Hormuz blockade and 8 days into Project Freedom pause, Iran is not using the diplomatic-rejection shock as kinetic-escalation opening — consistent with reconstitution + parliamentary-rhetoric ladder rather than maritime-pressure playbook. Branch re-pricing: kinetic ~22-27% (DOWN modestly — Trump in Beijing forces 48h pause and Iran missile fire rate -92% caps near-term kinetic posture); extended-economic-warfare ~50-55% (UP — trinary regime + state-media synchronised hardening + rial accelerating + nuclear file escalation); negotiated-resolution ~18-23% (DOWN — Iran simultaneously synchronised hardening across all state media plus weapons-grade rhetoric makes near-term landing zone narrower).

active_triggers.condition: Mojtaba Khamenei appears on video/audio (proof of life and command)
Iranian rial breaks 2,000,000/USD black market (Brooks hyperinflation thesis confirmation)
active_triggers.note_2026-05-13: May 12 close 1,842,000 IRR/USD (+0.66% d/d, +2.4% over 72h). 2M ETA recalibrated to May 22-24 if linear (vs prior brief's May 19-21). Still on track, slower than implied by prior 48h read.

active_triggers.condition: Iran resumes enrichment to weapons-grade levels (>20% U-235) publicly OR confirmed operational policy shift
active_triggers.note: Parliament NSFP Commission spokesperson Rezaei publicly named 90% enrichment as retaliatory threshold if Iran is struck again (CONFIRMED RHETORIC, NOT ACTION). Tasnim/IRNA/Tabnak/Mehr amplified without softening — sanctioned signal not leaked outlier. Trigger requires operational change to enrichment policy, not parliamentary rhetoric. Iran current stated ceiling 60% with ~440 kg stockpile.

active_triggers.condition: Iran's missile stockpile depleted to point of inability to sustain retaliation
Iran accepts direct talks with US (publicly acknowledged)
Iran retaliatory strike for Tangsiri assassination
Iran formally accepts/signs 14-point MOU with US (within 14 days = by 2026-05-21) — Nasr/Sadjadpour falsification test
Iran formal response within Trump's 1-week window (closes 2026-05-14)
active_triggers.note: RESOLVED 2026-05-12: Iran delivered formal multi-page written response via Pakistan May 10-11 (CONFIRMED ACTION); Trump publicly rejected as 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE / garbage' Truth Social May 10 evening + Oval Office May 11. The clock fired — Iran responded — but the response was rejected, so the channel did not collapse; framework now on 'massive life support' per Trump.

active_triggers.condition: Trump orders renewed strikes on Iran following 1-week clock close (post-May 14, post-Beijing return May 15-16)
active_triggers.note: Trump convened WH Sit-Room May 11 with Vance/Rubio/Hegseth/Ratcliffe/Caine/Witkoff; renewed military action explicitly under discussion; one official 'Trump is going to hit them a bit'; NO ORDERS ISSUED. Beijing trip May 14-15 forces pause window. Watch May 15-20 for any orders.

active_triggers.condition: Hormuz transit volume above 30 vessels/day for 3 consecutive days (operational reopening, vs current 5-6/day vs 138 norm)

recent_signals.headline: DAY 75 OF HORMUZ BLOCKADE / TRUMP 1-WEEK CLOCK DAY 6/7 (closes May 14) — TRUMP DEPARTED FOR BEIJING DECLARING 'DOES NOT NEED XI'S HELP ON IRAN' / US WILL WIN 'ONE WAY OR THE OTHER' (CONFIRMED, pre-departure South Lawn) — pre-Beijing posture materially HARDER than May 6–10 pulse-test phase that floated cooperation language on Chinese leverage on Tehran. Al Jazeera + NPR led with 'doesn't need Xi'; PBS NewsHour + CSIS framed both leaders as 'intent on keeping Iran war from overshadowing summit' — itself a downgrade from prior weekend's Chatham House 'can progress be made on Iran' framing. **IRAN STATE-MEDIA HARDENING ACROSS ALL CHANNELS — IRNA + Tasnim + Parliament NSFP Commission now publicly synchronised on 'we will not bow / we will retaliate if struck again / weapons-grade is on the table' line (HARDENING vs April's IRNA-vs-Tasnim divergence pattern).** PARLIAMENTARY SPOKESPERSON EBRAHIM REZAEI (NSFP Commission) MAY 12: '90 percent enrichment may be one of Iran's available options if the country is subjected to another attack' — FIRST TIME IN CYCLE a sitting Iranian parliamentary spokesperson has publicly named weapons-grade enrichment as a retaliatory threshold (CONFIRMED RHETORIC, NOT ACTION — conditional on future attack, not an order or operational policy change). Current stated ceiling is 60% with ~440 kg stockpile; 90% line is breakout-to-bomb threshold. Amplified by Mehr News (Iranian state), Tabnak (Iranian state), Euronews, Iran International (opposition-leaning, factual on quote), Tasnim (IRGC-linked), Al Bawaba — no editorial softening = Iranian state-media system permitted weapons-grade rhetoric as sanctioned policy signal. Tasnim ran on-record source: 'No one in Iran drafts plans to please Trump' — directly rejecting US 'garbage' framing. IRNA carried Pezeshkian's continued 'talks are not surrender' line. **DEPUTY LABOUR MINISTER MOHAMMADI CONFIRMED >1 MILLION DIRECT JOB LOSSES + 2 MILLION UNEMPLOYMENT-IMPACTED FROM THE WAR** (NYT citing Jerusalem Post) + Day 74 of comprehensive internet blackout. Iran publicly admitting domestic economic deterioration WHILE publicly hardening on nuclear file = classical regime-survival externalisation playbook now visible. **IRAN FM ARAGHCHI ARRIVES NEW DELHI MAY 13 FOR BRICS FM MEETING (May 14-15); MEETS MODI MAY 14 — SAME DAY TRUMP IN BEIJING** (CONFIRMED — Iran Embassy New Delhi + India TV + Tribune India + ChinaPulse + Open The Magazine). India holds 2026 BRICS presidency. Modi receives Iranian FM on the very day Trump is in Beijing trying — by his own departure-day language — to manage Iran without Chinese mediation; one day before Modi himself flies to UAE (now a confirmed third combatant per WSJ + Newsweek). BRICS agenda 'regional stability, multilateral cooperation, economic resilience' = code for India offering Iran non-aligned channel that is not Trump-led process. Most overt Indian strategic-autonomy choreography of cycle. Araghchi will sit at BRICS table with Chinese FM — China-Iran direct alignment WHILE Trump is in Beijing. **A5 RIAL TRAJECTORY RECALIBRATED — May 12 CLOSE PRINT IS 1,842,000 IRR/USD (+0.66% d/d, +12,000 IRR)** vs yesterday's brief's 1,853,000 (likely intraday quote). Revised 48h sequence: 1,799K → 1,830K (May 10) → 1,842K (May 12) = +2.4% over 72h. 2M trigger ETA shifts modestly to May 22-24 if linear (vs prior May 19-21). Canary still pointing same direction — accelerating — but slightly less aggressively. **A6 MOJTABA KHAMENEI DAY 6 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE post May 7 Pezeshkian meeting. NYT (citing 4 Iranian officials): serious injuries (multiple surgeries legs/arms, facial+lip burns affecting speech). Iranian aide rebuts ('perfect health... only fracture behind ear, slightly injured knee/back'). The National (Abu Dhabi) tilts toward injury narrative May 10. Institutional command without visible person remains stable equilibrium since Feb 28; trigger HAS NOT FIRED.** **B4 IRAN MISSILE FIRE RATE COLLAPSED 92% from Feb-Mar peak** (Jerusalem Post + CNN intel assessment). Feb 28 - Apr 20: 1,471 ballistic missiles fired at Israel/Jordan/Qatar/Kuwait/Bahrain/Saudi/UAE/Oman/Turkey. May 4-5 UAE small-scale was last meaningful kinetic response; nothing since. Capacity ceiling holding — capability ≠ willingness ≠ logistics; 'between a cold war and a hot war' architecture intact (Sadjadpour). **A9 KHARG SLICK CONSOLIDATED: Copernicus Sentinel-1/-2/-3 imagery now amplified by Al Jazeera + ynet + Jerusalem Post + Conflict and Environment Observatory — ~45 sq km west of Kharg, May 6-8 detection. Iranian VP Shina Ansari publicly denied Iranian-facility origin: 'foreign tanker dumping ballast water.' Fox May 11-12 ~12-20 sq km second slick is consistent with drift south rather than separate origin event — re-appearance trigger AMBIGUOUSLY ACTIVATED (drift ≠ re-appearance, ballast counter-claim not formally falsified). Western wires in slow-amplification mode on attribution.** **B1 OFAC ECONOMIC FURY EXTENDED — Treasury signalled prepared secondary sanctions on five Chinese teapot refineries (Hengli Petrochemical Dalian, Shandong Jincheng, Hebei Xinhai, Shouguang Luqing, Shandong Shengxing); China MOFCOM May 2 issued Prohibition Order under Blocking Rules — FIRST FORMAL CHINESE INVOCATION OF BLOCKING RULES vs US sanctions** (CONFIRMED Treasury + MOFCOM primary; Holland & Knight + Baker McKenzie independently corroborate). Trump arrives Beijing day after — Chinese have public legal ground prepared. **A10 NEWSWEEK (citing WSJ + 2 Western officials + 2 Iranian officials): SAUDI ARABIA LAUNCHED SECRET STRIKES AGAINST IRAN IN LATE MARCH** ('tit-for-tat retaliation when Saudi was hit') — on top of yesterday's UAE-Lavan WSJ disclosure (April 8 Mirage 2000-9). Iran has fired >2,800 missiles/drones at UAE territory cumulatively — MORE THAN AT ANY OTHER COUNTRY — Iran's prior 'punishment of US-aligned host' framing against UAE now confirmed retaliation against fully kinetic third combatant. One UAE Lavan-response strike reportedly coordinated with Israel. Saudi/Iran silent; Al Hadath (Saudi) editorial distance on UAE story but not Saudi-strikes. The Gulf-alignment graph requires Saudi to move from 'OPEC+/balancing/underwriter' toward partial kinetic participant — structural re-encoding. Net: ZERO Iranian kinetic retaliation post-Trump-rejection + post-Litani + post-Saudi-strikes-disclosure — consistent with reconstitution + parliamentary-rhetoric ladder, not maritime-pressure playbook. Negative-space remains the operative intelligence.

recent_signals.verification: Trump Beijing departure + 'doesn't need Xi' = CONFIRMED ACTION (departure) + CONFIRMED RHETORIC (statements) multi-source primary; Rezaei 90% enrichment threat = CONFIRMED RHETORIC NOT ACTION (Iran state media + opposition + Western press) — conditional on future attack, not enrichment-policy change; Iran state-media hardening across IRNA/Tasnim/Parliament = CONFIRMED multi-channel; Mohammadi labour-ministry job-loss admission = CONFIRMED Iranian-state primary (relayed via NYT/JPost); Araghchi New Delhi May 13 + BRICS May 14-15 + Modi meet = CONFIRMED (Iran Embassy primary + Indian press); Rial 1,842,000 May 12 close = CONFIRMED Bonbast+Alanchand (corrects prior brief's intraday quote 1,853,000); Mojtaba Day 6 silence = CONFIRMED absence; NYT injury narrative vs Iranian-aide denial = REPORTED on both sides; Iran missile fire rate -92% = REPORTED (JPost + CNN intel assessment); Kharg slick May 6-8 ~45 sq km = CONFIRMED Copernicus + multi-amplified; second slick May 11-12 consistent with drift = PARTIALLY CONFIRMED (Fox primary, mainstream wires lagging) — re-appearance trigger AMBIGUOUSLY activated; China MOFCOM Blocking Rules = CONFIRMED (MOFCOM primary + Holland & Knight + Baker McKenzie); Saudi strikes Iran late March = REPORTED (Newsweek+WSJ cluster, single primary, Saudi silent, Iran silent) — DO NOT ELEVATE to CONFIRMED.

recent_signals.headline: TRUMP 1-WEEK CLOCK DAY 5/7 — IRAN FORMALLY RESPONDED VIA PAKISTAN MAY 10-11 + TRUMP PUBLICLY REJECTED (Truth Social 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE' / Oval Office 'massive life support' / 'garbage' / '1% chance of living' doctor analogy); IRAN 14-POINT TERMS DISCLOSED — FIRST HEU CONCESSION OF CYCLE (dilute portion under IAEA + transfer remainder to third country) BUT WITH EXPLICIT RETURN CLAUSE if US exits any future deal (REPORTED — WSJ primary); Trump convened White House Situation Room May 11 with Vance/Rubio/Hegseth/Ratcliffe/Caine/Witkoff considering renewed military action (restart Project Freedom or strike 'remaining 25%' of designated Iran targets) — one official: 'Trump is going to hit them a bit' (NO ORDERS ISSUED — REPORTED via Axios); Trump China visit CONFIRMED May 14-15 (Trump departs May 13 afternoon for Beijing summit with Xi, Iran on agenda) creates FORCED PAUSE WINDOW exactly when 1-week clock closes May 14; Netanyahu CBS 60 Minutes aired May 11: war 'not over' until uranium removed + enrichment sites dismantled + proxies neutralized — 'you go in and you take it out'; Mojtaba 'alive but in bunker' (Netanyahu) — US + Israeli intel converge; **RIAL ACCELERATING APPROACH TO 2M TRIGGER**: 1,799K May 10 → 1,830K May 11 → 1,853K May 12 (+3.0% over 48h, +1.26% d/d); at current pace 2M would hit by May 19-21 if linear; official rate 1,311,203 = ~41% gap (CONFIRMED — AlanChand + Bonbast 1405/02/22 metadata); SECOND KHARG SLICK DETECTED MAY 11-12 (~12-20 sq km, smaller than May 6-8 45-65 sq km but persistence elevates storage-overflow hypothesis vs European-tanker-waste counter-claim); HOUTHI DAY 80 RED SEA QUIET POSSIBLY BROKEN MAY 11 — UKMTO confirmed explosions near vessel 130km SW of Hodeidah (NO CLAIM — non-claim itself a signal); Hezbollah killed IDF reservist WO Alexander Glovanyov May 10 near Manara (announced May 11) = 5TH IDF SOLDIER KILLED post-April 16 ceasefire all by FPV/explosive drones — SOLDIER not CIVILIAN, May 10 civilian-trigger UNTRIPPED HOLDS; May 12 SAM fired from Lebanon at IAF aircraft (CGTN single-source); IDF struck 30+ Lebanon locations May 11 + first Beirut southern-suburb strike since April 16 ceasefire; Lebanese Health Ministry ≥23 killed in 24h, cumulative war toll 2,869; Knesset extended reservist authority to May 31; IDF Chief Zamir warned 12,000 additional recruits needed (mostly combat troops); NEW OFAC SANCTIONS WAVE MAY 11-12 — 12 entities (4 HK, 4 UAE, 1 Oman) + 3 individuals for IRGC Shaid Purja'fari + Golden Globe Turkey-cover company facilitating Iran→China oil; WSJ MAY 11: UAE SECRETLY STRUCK IRAN'S LAVAN ISLAND REFINERY APRIL 8 using Mirage 2000-9 aircraft (55,000 bpd offline months) — reframes Iran's prior UAE-targeted strikes as direct retaliation against confirmed third combatant; UAE silent on WSJ exposure; CENTCOM tally 58→61 redirected (3 in 48h — below early-May pace, Project Freedom paused); Aramco CEO Nasser May 11: Hormuz transit 2-5 ships/day (vs ~6/day May 10), 100M bbl/week lost, 880M cumulative, market won't normalize until 2027 if disruption persists past mid-June; VLCC Agios Fanourios I (Iraqi Basra crude bound Vietnam) reversed course back into Gulf of Oman without crossing US blockade line — confidence-collapse signature even for compliant non-Iranian VLCCs; HMM Namu forensics public May 11 — Seoul stopped short of publicly blaming Iran (mine + torpedo ruled out; 2 unidentified aerial objects ~1min apart at stern) creating diplomatic friction with Trump; Vessel attribution of May 10 Doha strike clarified: Marshall Islands-flagged Safesea Neha, US-managed by Safesea Group (NJ); 2nd Safesea vessel hit this cycle (Safesea Vishnu March 12 Iraqi waters); Pravda attribution to two Iranian UAVs UNCONFIRMED by Western forensics; Modi May 10-11 Hyderabad address — seven appeals incl. defer gold purchases / cut fertilizer 50% / defer foreign travel — first major Indian-government public engagement of cycle; Modi 5-nation tour May 15-20 (UAE-Netherlands-Sweden-Norway-Italy). Iran tone hardening: Tasnim's Velayati Trump-Xi summit-timed jab ('We defeated you on the battlefield; never think you will emerge victorious in diplomacy'); IRNA carried Army spokesperson Akraminia 'surprising options' warning — military signaling through civilian outlet = establishment unified; Pezeshkian May 12 'resistance and protecting honor'; FM Baghaei 'legitimate' and 'reasonable' demands; Press TV 'talks are not surrender.'

recent_signals.verification: Iran formal response delivery via Pakistan = CONFIRMED ACTION (multi-source); Iran 14-point terms incl. HEU return-clause = REPORTED (WSJ primary, single-source on full terms; Iran-side terms separately corroborated via IRNA/Tasnim; amplification cascade real); Trump public rejection = CONFIRMED RHETORIC multi-source primary; Trump Sit-Room May 11 = CONFIRMED meeting + REPORTED on deliberation contents (no decisions taken); Trump China visit May 14-15 = CONFIRMED multi-source; Netanyahu 60 Minutes 'war not over' = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (broadcast primary); Rial 1,853,000 = CONFIRMED (AlanChand + Bonbast Persian-calendar metadata cross-check); Second Kharg slick = PARTIALLY CONFIRMED (Fox primary, mainstream Western wires lagging, commercial-satellite verification pending); Hodeidah vessel attack = CONFIRMED ACTION (UKMTO primary) + UNCONFIRMED attribution (NO Houthi claim); Glovanyov KIA = CONFIRMED (IDF official + 7+ outlets); SAM-at-IAF May 12 = REPORTED (CGTN single-source); Beirut southern-suburb strike = CONFIRMED (first since April 16); Knesset reservist extension + Zamir 12,000 = CONFIRMED (JNS + ToI); OFAC sanctions = CONFIRMED (Treasury primary); UAE Lavan April 8 strike = REPORTED (WSJ primary, single-source on operational details; UAE has not publicly acknowledged); Aramco Nasser quotes = CONFIRMED (industry-CEO authority); Agios Fanourios U-turn = CONFIRMED (Bloomberg primary, gCaptain secondary); HMM Namu forensics + Seoul-Iran-attribution non-call = CONFIRMED (Seoul official briefing); Safesea Neha attribution = CONFIRMED (IndexBox/FreightWaves vessel ID); Iran tone hardening = CONFIRMED multi-source (Tasnim/IRNA/Press TV/Pezeshkian primary statements)

recent_signals.headline: TRUMP 1-WEEK CLOCK DAY 3/7; TRUMP SOFTENED FROM 'FRIDAY SHOULD RESPOND' TO 'NO DEADLINE / WE'LL SEE WHAT HAPPENS' (UPDATED — material US public-posture softening); CENTCOM PRECISION TALLY 58 REDIRECTED + 4 DISABLED SINCE APRIL 13 (UPDATED — refines yesterday's >70-tankers-held framing); BULK CARRIER STRUCK 23NM NE OF DOHA SUNDAY MORNING (NEW — first commercial vessel attack since CMA CGM May 5, FIRST near Qatar's coast, NO claim of responsibility); KHARG ISLAND SATELLITE-CONFIRMED OIL SLICK (NEW — first hard-data signal blockade biting at production-export interface; cause CONTESTED — Iran blames European tanker waste, Fox-quoted experts suggest storage-overflow dumping); BAHRAIN DETAINED 41 ALLEGED IRGC-LINKED INDIVIDUALS (NEW — first major Gulf-state internal action against alleged IRGC network); UAE AIR-DEFENSE SCALE REFINED (UPDATED — 2 ballistic + 3 drones, 3 wounded May 8); HEZBOLLAH-IDF DAY 14 KINETIC CONTINUED (IDF 85+ targets, 12 killed S Lebanon, 7 in Saksakiyeh; Hezbollah drones wounded 3 IDF reservists; trigger UNTRIPPED Day 14/14 ceiling intact); IRGC STRIKE ON PDKI GIRDE CHAL KURDISH CAMP (second Kurdish-camp strike in 5 days); RIAL MODEST REVERSAL 1,812K → 1,803K → 1,799K (CONFIRMED — AlanChand); MOKHBER 'ATOMIC-BOMB' HORMUZ DOCTRINE unchanged; PEZESHKIAN-MOJTABA 2.5HR MEETING CLAIM 48 HOURS WITHOUT STATE-MEDIA CORROBORATION — silence is the signal. Tasnim continues semi-official 'Iran forced criminal America to accept its 10-point plan' counter-narrative for domestic audiences (CLAIMED). FM Baghaei pushed back against Trump's 'love tap' framing as 'naive euphemisms.' Iranian diaspora protests planned in 30+ cities globally Sunday May 10 (REPORTED — first major coordinated diaspora mobilization since cycle began).

recent_signals.verification: Trump softened deadline framing = CONFIRMED RHETORIC multi-source primary; CENTCOM 58/4 tally = CONFIRMED ACTION (CENTCOM primary, multi-source); Bulk carrier near Doha = CONFIRMED ACTION (UKMTO primary, multi-source); perpetrator UNKNOWN (no claim); Kharg satellite slick = CONFIRMED imagery (Copernicus + multiple Western corroborators); CAUSE CONTESTED (Iran lawmaker via Iran International/Maariv vs Fox News-quoted unnamed experts — neither side independently confirmed); Bahrain 41 detentions = CONFIRMED ACTION (Bahrain MoI primary, multi-source); UAE air defense engagement = CONFIRMED multi-source (UAE Defense Ministry primary, 3 wounded confirmed); Hezbollah-IDF kinetic Day 14 = CONFIRMED multi-source (IDF + Lebanese Health Ministry primaries); Hezbollah Mt. Meron drone reach acknowledged at MILITARY-target only — trigger UNTRIPPED Day 14/14; PDKI Girde Chal strike = REPORTED (FDD/Hengaw single-side); Rial 1,799,000 IRR/USD = CONFIRMED (AlanChand); Pezeshkian-Mojtaba meeting CLAIMED 48 hours, NO state-media corroboration = CONFIRMED ABSENCE; Iranian diaspora protests Sunday = REPORTED (planning, actual turnout pending)

recent_signals.headline: TRINARY REGIME HARDENING — TRUMP 1-WEEK CLOCK NOW DAY 2/7; SOFT FRIDAY DEADLINE PASSED WITHOUT FORMAL IRANIAN RESPONSE; CENTCOM DISCLOSED 70-TANKER BLOCKADE SCALE + SECOND DAY OF TANKER STRIKES (M/T SEA STAR III + M/T SEVDA, MAY 8); MOKHBER 'ATOMIC-BOMB' HORMUZ SPEECH; PEZESHKIAN CLAIMED 2.5-HOUR FACE-TO-FACE WITH MOJTABA (CLAIMED); ZERO HORMUZ TRANSITS MAY 7 + 1,500 VESSELS ANCHORED. Rubio said Iran 'should' respond Friday May 8; Trump said expected response 'Friday night' but 'we'll see what happens'; no formal Iranian response filed by Friday close. Baghaei (FM) reiterated 'still considering proposal,' will relay 'to Pakistani mediators when complete.' Tasnim (IRGC channel) called US text 'unacceptable clauses,' propaganda 'aimed at justifying Trump's retreat.' Trump Truth Social May 8 evening: 'we'll knock them out a lot harder, and a lot more violently, in the future, if they don't get their Deal signed, FAST.' Mokhber (adviser to supreme leader, described as Mojtaba's adviser in Pakistani/Iranian press): 'Strait of Hormuz represents an opportunity as precious as an atomic bomb'; pledged Iran 'will change the [legal] regime of this strait — through international law if possible, and unilaterally if not' — first leadership-adjacent voice publicly endorsing unilateral codification of selective Hormuz control as permanent strategic asset. Pezeshkian on state TV claimed 2.5-hour 'completely unmediated' meeting with Mojtaba; provided no date, location, witnesses, readout, or visual evidence; CNN/KVIA same day reported US intel assessment that Mojtaba is alive 'shaping strategy' but 'out of public view.' US Navy F/A-18 from USS George H.W. Bush disabled M/T Sea Star III and M/T Sevda May 8 (precision-munition tactic, same as M/T Hasna May 7); CENTCOM disclosed 70+ tankers held under blockade and 20 warships, 200 aircraft, 15,000 troops enforcing — 'fully in effect.' Iran claimed counter-seizure of unidentified tanker in Gulf of Oman. Iranian regional official said May 7 strikes wounded 10 sailors, 5 missing (single-side). Lloyd's List confirmed ZERO Hormuz transits May 7 (down from 7 May 6), 1,500 vessels anchored in Persian Gulf. Trump publicly thanked Pakistan civilian and military leadership for mediation; revealed Pakistan 'asked the US not to militarily engage Iran during negotiations.' Rial weakened to 1,812,000 IRR/USD remittance May 8 (vs 1,775,000 May 7) — yesterday's appreciation chirp silenced. Sadjadpour: 'extending into a one-week stall pattern; alive but operationally indistinguishable from a slow-roll.'
recent_signals.verification: Trump 1-week clock + Friday soft-deadline pulse-test = CONFIRMED multi-source; Mokhber 'atomic-bomb' speech = CONFIRMED RHETORIC/THREAT (institutional, multi-source primary); Pezeshkian-Mojtaba 2.5-hour meeting = CLAIMED (statement CONFIRMED multi-source; meeting unverified — no date/location/witnesses/visual); US intel 'Mojtaba shaping strategy out of public view' = REPORTED (CNN/KVIA citing US intel community assessment); CENTCOM tanker disabling May 8 + 70-tanker blockade scale = CONFIRMED ACTION (CENTCOM primary, multi-source); Iran tanker counter-seizure = CONFIRMED action (Iran-side single-source on identity, action multi-source); Iran casualty figures (10 wounded, 5 missing) = REPORTED single-side; civilian-area allegations = CLAIMED (no independent corroboration); Trump-Pakistan diplomatic-constraint disclosure = CONFIRMED RHETORIC/SIGNAL (Trump primary, Pakistan Today multi-source); Hormuz zero transits + 1,500 vessels = CONFIRMED OPERATIONAL FACT (Lloyd's List + CNN); Rial 1,812,000 IRR/USD = CONFIRMED (AlanChand)

recent_signals.headline: MOU FRAMEWORK CIRCULATING — 14-POINT MEMORANDUM-OF-UNDERSTANDING DRAFTED WITH 48-HOUR IRAN RESPONSE WINDOW. Provisions: end-of-war declaration, 12-15 yr Iran enrichment moratorium (compromise from 20yr-US/5yr-Iran), Iran ships out HEU stockpile (custodian TBD), US lifts sanctions and frozen assets, BOTH sides lift Hormuz blockades, 30-day post-signing detail window. MOU originally Iran's proposal (response to 9-point US plan via Tasnim May 3). Witkoff+Kushner negotiating directly + via Pakistani mediators. **Iran posture bifurcated:** Baqaei (FM): 'assessing,' 'lasting peace top priority' (conciliatory civilian); Tasnim (IRGC-aligned): 'more wishlist than reality' (hardline-leverage, no escalation call); Press TV: 'Project Freedom perishes... Iran's asymmetric deterrence' (triumphalist victory framing — historically precedes deal acceptance). Trump warned 'bombing starts at significantly higher level and intensity' if no deal. Iran also signaled FIRST EXPLICIT REOPENING OFFER for Hormuz: 'reopen if US lifts blockade and war ends' (PBS/AP/Al Jazeera/IRGC Navy 'safe transit with new procedures'). [CORRECTION 2026-05-08: prior version of this signal stated 'FM Araghchi arrives India May 7-8 for 20th Joint Commission with Jaishankar+Murmu (75th anniversary India-Iran Friendship Treaty) — parallel-track diplomacy.' That JCM occurred in May 2025 — year-stale-source error caught post-publication.] CMA CGM San Antonio struck May 5 by cruise missile (CBS attribution to Iran, IRGC has NOT claimed) — kinetic-tail risk persists despite diplomatic-track pricing. Mojtaba Day 60-61 absent; AI-generated videos confirmed by TIME — supreme-leader vacuum is structural reason for Pezeshkian-IRGC factional split.
recent_signals.verification: MOU drafting = REPORTED (Axios scoop multi-corroborated, final text not published); Iran-Hormuz reopening offer = REPORTED→CONFIRMED (PBS/AP direct quotes, IRGC Navy spokesperson statement); Hormuz still operationally closed (5-6 vessels/day vs 138 norm — CONFIRMED via Strauss Center/Lloyd's List); Iran factional bifurcation = CONFIRMED (Baqaei vs Tasnim vs Press TV multi-outlet); Araghchi India visit = CONFIRMED (MEA primary); CMA CGM strike = CONFIRMED action, CLAIMED Iran attribution (single-source US officials via CBS, no Iranian claim, no independent corroboration); Mojtaba AI-generated videos = REPORTED (TIME single-source, Iran International corroborated, Iranian state has not denied)
